description: Automated exception rules used by Flow_RunExceptionEngine and audit-exceptions.pq. severity drives the dashboard badge and the Teams escalation in the flow.

rules.name: Journal entry posted on a weekend
rules.description: Manual journal entries posted on Saturday/Sunday — possible after-hours or bypass.

rules.name: Journal entry after period close
rules.description: Entries posted in a closed period — should be approved adjusting JEs only.

rules.name: Round-amount manual journal entry
rules.description: Amounts ending in 000 above threshold — often estimates or plug entries.

rules.name: Duplicate voucher reference
rules.description: Same voucher number used by multiple postings on the same date and ledger.

rules.name: Bank entry unreconciled > 30 days
rules.description: Bank statement line that has not been matched to a ledger entry within 30 days of statement date.

rules.name: Large bank outflow without matching ledger entry
rules.description: Single debit > materiality with no matched ledger posting.

rules.name: GST sales vs purchase variance over threshold
rules.description: Per-invoice variance from gst-reconciliation.pq exceeds tolerance.

rules.name: Books outward supplies vs GSTR-3B variance
rules.description: Aggregate books turnover - GSTR-3B taxable value exceeds materiality.

rules.name: ITC claimed vs GSTR-2B variance
rules.description: ITC in books that does not appear in GSTR-2B for the same period.

rules.name: Duplicate vendor invoice number
rules.description: Same vendor + invoice no + amount posted multiple times.

rules.name: Negative net payroll amount
rules.description: Computed net pay below zero — usually data-entry error.

rules.name: TDS short deduction
rules.description: Payment to vendor where applicable section rate × base > deducted TDS.

rules.name: Receivable aged over 90 days
rules.description: Customer balance open > 90 days from invoice date.

rules.name: Depreciation variance vs recomputation
rules.description: Book depreciation does not match Power Query recomputation.

rules.name: Cash payment over Section 40A(3) limit
rules.description: Single-day cash payment to a party > INR 10,000 (35,000 transporters).
